text.title: Experimentation at Scale Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Checkout button experiment shipped on guardrail-safe lift
example.note: Illustrates rules hypothesis-pre-registered, guardrail-floor, srm-check-mandatory, readout-binary-decision.

example.title: Zombie-hold experiment ignored SRM and switched primary
example.code: experiment_id: EXP1 hypothesis: stuff primary_metric: {name: x} guardrails: [{name: latency, floor: <=250}] mde: {effect_size: '?', sample_size: 0, runtime_days: 0} srm_passed: false decision: hold
example.note: Violates pre-registration, guardrail count, MDE pre-flight, SRM check, binary-decision — full chain of bad practice.
